meaning: v.错误地诊断(或判断、断定)
examples: Libel a hospital when they misdiagnose your illness.
Objective To analyze the cause of misdiagnose of Endobronchial tuberculosis.
In many cases, doctors misdiagnose patients or give them the wrong treatment or not enough treatment.
Will we misdiagnose the problem and devise a cure that will kill the patient?
Yet studies of autopsies have shown that doctors misdiagnose fatal illnesses about 20 percent of the time.
